summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EasyLeaz CRM system. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with extended leasing form and admin dashboard.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections
Extended leasing form with new fields (marital_status, nationality, birth_date, address, residence_permit, children_count, housing_cost, employment_date)
File upload buttons (identity document, salary slips)
Form validation shows errors for required fields
Admin login page with JWT authentication
Admin dashboard with 4 tabs (Dashboard, Leads, Vehicles, CMS)
CRM stats display (total, pending, approved, rejected)
Leads management with filters and search
Lead detail dialog with status update buttons
